questions.question: Who is the first person Paul greets and commends as a servant of the church?
Paul warns the Romans to watch out for people who cause what?
options: Divisions and obstacles contrary to the teaching
questions.answer: Divisions and obstacles contrary to the teaching

questions.question: Paul personally wrote every word of this letter in his own hand.
The God of peace will soon crush _____ under your feet.
I, _____, the one writing this letter, greet you in the Lord.
